title: Don't Read This on a Plane
original_title: Don't Read This on a Plane
overview: As novelist Jovana Fey attempts to check into the first hotel of her 3-week European book tour, she learns that her publisher has gone bankrupt. Penniless and stranded, she decides to continue the tour regardless.
